# Lab 16 Summary: Voice Impersonation Analysis

## Completed Tasks:
1. ✅ Set up voice cloning environment with Coqui TTS
2. ✅ Implemented AI-based voice impersonation system
3. ✅ Conducted vishing call simulations
4. ✅ Developed voice analysis and detection tools
5. ✅ Created authentication countermeasures

## Generated Files:
- Voice samples and cloned audio
- Detection analysis reports
- Security assessment documentation

## Key Findings:
- Voice cloning technology accessibility
- Detection method effectiveness
- Security implications and countermeasures
